Name: Daily Sun Gather I
Condition: Collect 3000 units of sun during one day

Name: Daily Sun Gather II
Condition: Collect 4000 units of sun during one day

Name: Daily Sun Gather III
Condition: Collect 5000 units of sun during one day

Name: Chapter Hunter
Condition: Defeat 50 zombies from a chapter

Name: Pro Plant Killer
Condition: Kill ten zombies using only plants

Name: Only Cactus
Condition: Kill ten zombies using only cactus

Name: Economic Vegetarian I
Condition: Win a level without losing more than 1 plants

Name: Economic Vegetarian II
Condition: Win a level without losing more than 3 plants

Name: Economic Vegetarian III
Condition: Win a level without losing more than 5 plants

Name: Defense Master
Condition: Finish a level with exactly zero sun

Name: Speedrun
Condition: Kill 10 zombies in less than 30 seconds from the start of the first wave

Name: Professional Demolisher
Condition: Use 3 explosive plants in one level

Name: Symmetry
Condition: The garden must end up symmetrical

Name: Family Slaughter
Condition: Use only plants of a specific family to kill zombies

Name: Blooming within Limits
Condition: Win the level without using any plant from a specific family

Name: Night or Morning
Condition: Finish a day level using only night plants (mushrooms)

Name: Back-to-Back Victory
Condition: Win 5 consecutive levels on the highest difficulty

Name: Almost Win
Condition: Kill 10 zombies in the first column of a row that has no lawn mower

Name: No OCD
Condition: Win the level with no symmetry in the garden (except the middle row)

Name: Cloudy Day
Condition: Play a level using only 3 sun-producing plants

Name: One Less Column
Condition: Win a level without planting anything in a specific column

Name: Defenseless Row
Condition: Win a level without planting anything in a specific row

Name: Defenseless Cross
Condition: Win a level leaving a specific column and row empty
